test case id: tc-userregistration-002 title: failed user registration (password mismatch) module: userregistration source pages: 2 preconditions: application is running. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - confirm password: wrongpassword test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "utente non registrato". 3. enter "testuser" as the username. 4. enter "testpassword" as the password. 5. enter "wrongpassword" as the confirm password. 6. click on "utente registrato con successo al servizio?". expected result: the system should display an error message indicating that the passwords do not match.

test case id: tc-addvehicle-002 title: add vehicle from dataset module: addvehicle source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running. test data: - vehicle type: car - number of doors: 4 - color: red - registration number: abc123 test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "aggiungere veicolo". 3. click on "cerca il veicolo del dataset". 4. enter "abc123" as the registration number. 5. verify that the vehicle is found in the dataset. 6. click on "selezione e aggiungere il veicolo". expected result: the vehicle should be selected and added to the list.

test case id: tc-addvehicle-001 title: add vehicle manually module: addvehicle source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running. test data: - vehicle type: car - number of doors: 4 - color: red - registration number: abc123 test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "aggiungere veicolo". 3. click on "inserisci il veicolo manuale/porte". 4. enter "car" as the vehicle type. 5. enter "4" as the number of doors. 6. enter "red" as the color. 7. enter "abc123" as the registration number. 8. click on "cerca il veicolo del dataset". 9. verify that the vehicle is not found in the dataset. 10. click on "selezione e aggiungere il veicolo". expected result: the vehicle should be added successfully and displayed in the list.

test case id: tc-addvehicle-001 title: add vehicle manually module: addvehicle source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running. test data: - vehicle type: car - number of doors: 4 - color: red - registration number: abc123 test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "aggiungere veicolo". 3. click on "inserisci il veicolo manuale/porte". 4. enter "car" as the vehicle type. 5. enter "4" as the number of doors. 6. enter "red" as the color. 7. enter "abc123" as the registration number. 8. click on "cerca il veicolo del dataset". 9. verify that the vehicle is not found in the dataset. 10. click on "selezione e aggiungere il veicolo". expected result: the vehicle should be added successfully and displayed in the list.

test case id: tc-userregistration-001 title: successful user registration module: userregistration source pages: 2 preconditions: application is running. test data: - username: testuser - password: testpassword - confirm password: testpassword test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "utente non registrato". 3. enter "testuser" as the username. 4. enter "testpassword" as the password. 5. enter "testpassword" again as the confirm password. 6. click on "utente registrato con successo al servizio?". expected result: the user should be registered successfully and redirected to the main application screen.

test case id: tc-addvehicle-003 title: add vehicle with invalid registration number module: addvehicle source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running. test data: - vehicle type: car - number of doors: 4 - color: red - registration number: abc123456 test steps: 1. launch the application. 2. click on "aggiungere veicolo". 3. click on "inserisci il veicolo manuale/porte". 4. enter "car" as the vehicle type. 5. enter "4" as the number of doors. 6. enter "red" as the color. 7. enter "abc123456" as the registration number. 8. click on "cerca il veicolo del dataset". 9. verify that the vehicle is not found in the dataset. 10. click on "selezione e aggiungere il veicolo". expected result: the system should display an error message indicating that the registration number is invalid.
